title: eulophia angolensis
intro: Eulophia angolensis, also known as the Angolan grass orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eulophia angolensis include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
